landing.hero.title: Turn Website Prototypes Into Real Revenue
landing.hero.subtitle: We build professional website prototypes for businesses that don't yet have an online presence. You connect with business owners, present the prototype, and earn commission when they become clients.
landing.hero.pill: New AgencyPro Platform is now live
landing.trusted.title: A Smarter Way To Sell
landing.trusted.textp1: Most sales opportunities require you to spend hours searching for prospects. Our platform removes that obstacle. Every opportunity is researched, qualified, and prepared before it reaches you.
landing.trusted.textp2: You focus on conversations and relationships. We focus on sourcing businesses and creating professional website demonstrations that showcase what is possible.
landing.trusted.card.title: Target Lead Prepared
landing.trusted.card.subtitle: Acme Corp Prototype
landing.how.title: How It Works
landing.how.step1.title: 1. We Find Businesses
landing.how.step1.desc: Our team identifies businesses operating without professional websites.
landing.how.step2.title: 2. We Build A Prototype
landing.how.step2.desc: A customized website prototype is created specifically for that business.
landing.how.step3.title: 3. You Present The Opportunity
landing.how.step3.desc: You contact the business owner and present the prototype.
landing.how.step4.title: 4. You Earn Commission
landing.how.step4.desc: When the business signs up, you receive commission on the sale.
landing.benefits.title: Why Agents Love The Platform
landing.benefits.card1.title: Ready-Made Opportunities
landing.benefits.card1.desc: No need to search for prospects.
landing.benefits.card2.title: Professional Website Prototypes
landing.benefits.card2.desc: Every lead includes a customized demonstration.
landing.benefits.card3.title: Flexible Working Hours
landing.benefits.card3.desc: Work from anywhere at your own pace.
landing.benefits.card4.title: Continuous Lead Supply
landing.benefits.card5.title: Training Included
landing.benefits.card5.desc: Learn how to pitch and close effectively.
landing.benefits.card6.title: Referral Rewards
landing.benefits.card6.desc: Earn additional income by introducing new agents.
landing.earnings.title: Your Potential Income
landing.earnings.desc: Just a few successful sales each month can generate meaningful commission income. Use our earnings calculator to estimate your monthly revenue based on your performance.
landing.referral.title: Earn Beyond Your Own Sales
landing.referral.desc: Invite qualified agents to join the platform and earn referral commissions on their first successful sales. Build your own network while continuing to close deals.
landing.training.title: Everything You Need To Succeed
landing.training.desc: New agents gain access to comprehensive training, sales scripts, presentation guides, objection-handling resources, and ongoing support. No technical or web design experience is required.
landing.faq.title: FAQ Preview
landing.cta.title: Ready To Start Closing Deals?
landing.cta.desc: Apply today, complete your training, and gain access to a growing marketplace of website opportunities.
auth.login.title: Welcome back
auth.login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.
auth.register.title: Apply as an Agent
auth.register.subtitle: Join the premier platform for website prototype sales.
auth.name: Full Name
hub.title: The Agent Academy
hub.subtitle: Congratulations on taking the first step. This training hub will teach you how our business model works, how commissions are earned, how to present website prototypes effectively, and how to build long-term success on the platform.
hub.req: Before gaining access to live opportunities, you must complete the training modules and pass the certification assessment.
hub.mod1.title: Module 1: The Business Model
hub.mod1.p1: Our platform identifies businesses operating without professional websites.
hub.mod1.p2: We create website prototypes tailored to those businesses and provide them to agents.
hub.mod1.p3: Agents present these opportunities to business owners and earn commissions when sales are completed.
hub.mod2.title: Module 2: Understanding Website Value
hub.mod2.p1: Many businesses rely entirely on social media. Without a website, they often lose credibility, visibility, and potential customers.
hub.mod2.p2: A professional website helps businesses: Build trust, Generate leads, Improve visibility, Showcase products, and Increase sales.
hub.mod3.title: Module 3: Contacting Business Owners
hub.mod3.p1: Always remain professional. Focus on helping the business rather than selling aggressively.
hub.mod3.p2: The prototype should be positioned as an opportunity, not a sales pitch.
hub.mod4.title: Module 4: Handling Objections
hub.mod4.o1: I Already Use Facebook: A website complements social media and creates a professional online presence.
hub.mod4.o2: I Don't Need A Website: Many customers expect businesses to have a website before making purchasing decisions.
hub.mod4.o3: It's Too Expensive: The website should be viewed as an investment that can generate new customers and revenue.
hub.mod5.title: Module 5: Commission Structure
hub.mod5.p1: Commissions are paid after successful project confirmation and payment collection. Referral commissions are paid according to platform policies.
hub.cert.title: Agent Certification Assessment
hub.cert.desc: Complete the assessment below. A passing score is required before access to the Agent Portal is granted. Results are reviewed by the administration team.
dash.welcome.title: Welcome back.
dash.welcome.desc: Your next opportunity may already be waiting. Review available clients, monitor your progress, and track your commissions from one place.
market.title: Available Clients
market.subtitle: Find companies you want to contact and connect with them.
referral.title: Invite Friends
referral.subtitle: Ask your friends who would like to sell websites to join us. You earn money for every successful friend.
